content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: low volatility environment (Vol: 22.1%) with mixed breadth (3/8 sectors positive), momentum concentrated in a few names.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND: TUPRS (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.14%), TRALT (1W: +7.21% | 1M: +27.41%). Technology & Telecom RECOVERY: KONTR (1W: +55.75% | 1M: -11.87%). Holding & Investment RECOVERY: DOHOL (1W: +3.42% | 1M: -3.73%).

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Banking & Finance BELOW TREND: AKBNK (1W: -6.78% | 1M: +2.92%), HALKB (1W: -7.40% | 1M: -10.43%). Retail & Food BELOW TREND: BIMAS (1W: +4.34% | 1M: -1.59%) is a lone bright spot. Construction & REIT CORRECTION: ALARK (1W: -4.39% | 1M: -5.38%).

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: +55.75% | 1M: -11.87%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.14%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +7.21% | 1M: +27.41%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +7.06% | 1M: +18.57%) ABOVE TREND; VESTL (1W: +6.02% | 1M: +9.44%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
OYAKC (1W: -3.63% | 1M: -2.13%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: -4.06% | 1M: -6.67%) BELOW TREND; SAHOL (1W: -4.23% | 1M: -1.20%) BELOW TREND; ALARK (1W: -4.39% | 1M: -5.38%) BELOW TREND; TTKOM (1W: -5.23% | 1M: -6.00%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: +55.75% | 1M: -11.87%) RECOVERY; TUPRS (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.14%) ABOVE TREND; TRALT (1W: +7.21% | 1M: +27.41%) ABOVE TREND; TRMET (1W: +7.06% | 1M: +18.57%) ABOVE TREND; HEKTS (1W: -7.90% | 1M: -21.71%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Defensive posture: AKBNK (1W: -6.78% | 1M: +2.92%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -3.37% | 1M: +0.00%) NEUTRAL, ISCTR (1W: -3.03% | 1M: +0.29%) CORRECTION, YKBNK (1W: -7.57% | 1M: +0.34%) CORRECTION, HALKB (1W: -7.40% | 1M: -10.43%) BELOW TREND — prefer selective entry on stabilization.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Mixed: EREGL (1W: +0.75% | 1M: +5.21%) ABOVE TREND, TOASO (1W: +0.25% | 1M: +6.98%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +6.02% | 1M: +9.44%) ABOVE TREND versus ASELS (1W: -7.38% | 1M: -2.05%) BELOW TREND and FROTO (1W: -2.33% | 1M: -5.49%) BELOW TREND.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Leading the market: TUPRS (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.14%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +7.21% | 1M: +27.41%) ABOVE TREND, TRMET (1W: +7.06% | 1M: +18.57%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +2.17% | 1M: -1.88%) RECOVERY; watch HEKTS (1W: -7.90% | 1M: -21.71%) BELOW TREND for downside risks.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on but concentrated: overweight Energy & Chemicals and selective industrials (TUPRS, TRALT, VESTL), tactical long in high-momentum KONTR with tight stops; underweight banks and weak telecoms until breadth broadens.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
KONTR (1W: +55.75% | 1M: -11.87%) RECOVERY for momentum exhaustion or continuation; TUPRS (1W: +7.57% | 1M: +13.14%) ABOVE TREND on energy flows; TRALT (1W: +7.21% | 1M: +27.41%) ABOVE TREND for trend confirmation; AKBNK (1W: -6.78% | 1M: +2.92%) CORRECTION for banking spillovers.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Energy & Chemicals ABOVE TREND for leadership and breadth contribution; Technology & Telecom RECOVERY for volatility-driven moves; Banking & Finance BELOW TREND for downside risk to market sentiment.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Monitor XU100 reaction to near-term highs (+momentum breakout) versus the 1M consolidation low; catalysts: CBRT policy comments, macro prints (inflation/PMI), and earnings/sector flows in Energy and Telecom.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Low-volatility, risk-on tape but participation is narrow: Energy & Chemicals and a handful of names (KONTR, TUPRS, TRALT) are driving gains while banks and several large caps lag. Positioning should be selective—lean into leaders with defined stops and avoid broad sector exposure until breadth improves.
